body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/purchase-pay/reconciliation/core/service/generate 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/purchase-pay/reconciliation/core/service/generate 
 ## 接口描述 
用于客户在采购付款的场景下，批量根据入库单生成对账单，并可选自动发起对账

- 单次最多支持500条入库单
- 入库单要求是同一个供应商和法人公司
- 入库单必须是需要对账的入库单，并且状态是待对账
- 如果选择了自动发起对账，则要求入库单的供应商和公司有绑定关系 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"inveOrderIds","label":"%E5%85%A5%E5%BA%93%E5%8D%95%E5%8F%B7%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"%5B%22order1%22%2C%22order2%22%5D","maxLength":"500","required":true,"desc":"%20%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%9A500%E4%B8%AA"},"children":[]},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"autoReconciliation","label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E8%87%AA%E5%8A%A8%E5%8F%91%E8%B5%B7%E5%AF%B9%E8%B4%A6","exampleValue":"true","desc":"%20%E9%BB%98%E8%AE%A4%E6%98%AFfalse","maxLength":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"remark","maxLength":"200","label":"%E5%A4%87%E6%B3%A8","exampleValue":"%22%E5%A4%87%E6%B3%A8123%22","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"operatorEmpNumber","required":true,"label":"%E6%93%8D%E4%BD%9C%E4%BA%BA%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"%228029148%22","maxLength":"50"}}]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"returnCode","required":false,"label":"%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"SUC0000","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":true,"label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","exampleValue":"false","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%22%E8%AF%B7%E6%A3%80%E6%9F%A5%E5%85%A5%E5%BA%93%E5%8D%95%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E4%B8%BA%E5%90%8C%E4%B8%80%E4%B8%AA%E4%BE%9B%E5%BA%94%E5%95%86%22","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"body","label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E4%BD%93","exampleValue":"","required":false},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"billId","label":"%E5%AF%B9%E8%B4%A6%E5%8D%95%E5%8F%B7","required":true,"exampleValue":"2025081204577220"}}]}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 ### 请求报文
```json
{
    
    "inveOrderIds": [
        "2025-swq-2"
    ],
    "remark": "这是一个自动对账单",
    "operatorEmpNumber": "123456",
    "autoReconciliation": true
}
```
### 响应报文
- 示例1
```json
{
    "body": 2025082804630478,
    "returnCode": "SUC0000",
    "success": true,
    "message": "成功"
}
```
- 示例2
```json
{
    "returnCode": "EROOR2",
    "success": false,
    "message": "存在作废或重复发起对账的入库单：2025-swq-2"
}
```  
## 错误码说明 
| 错误码| 错误信息|解决方案|
  | --- | --- | --- |
  | EROOR2| 业务执行错误	| 请参考message错误信息|
body.docCntHtml:
接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/purchase-pay/reconciliation/core/service/generate

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/purchase-pay/reconciliation/core/service/generate

接口描述

用于客户在采购付款的场景下，批量根据入库单生成对账单，并可选自动发起对账

  • 单次最多支持500条入库单
  • 入库单要求是同一个供应商和法人公司
  • 入库单必须是需要对账的入库单，并且状态是待对账
  • 如果选择了自动发起对账，则要求入库单的供应商需和公司有绑定关系

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[]}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"inveOrderIds","label":"%E5%85%A5%E5%BA%93%E5%8D%95%E5%8F%B7%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"%5B%22order1%22%2C%22order2%22%5D","maxLength":"500","required":true,"desc":"%20%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%9A500%E4%B8%AA"},"children":[]},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"autoReconciliation","label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E8%87%AA%E5%8A%A8%E5%8F%91%E8%B5%B7%E5%AF%B9%E8%B4%A6","exampleValue":"true","desc":"%20%E9%BB%98%E8%AE%A4%E6%98%AFfalse","maxLength":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"remark","maxLength":"200","label":"%E5%A4%87%E6%B3%A8","exampleValue":"%22%E5%A4%87%E6%B3%A8123%22","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"operatorEmpNumber","required":true,"label":"%E6%93%8D%E4%BD%9C%E4%BA%BA%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"%228029148%22","maxLength":"50"}}]}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]}

接口输出参数

{"responseHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}],"responseBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"returnCode","required":false,"label":"%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"SUC0000","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":true,"label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","exampleValue":"false","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%22%E8%AF%B7%E6%A3%80%E6%9F%A5%E5%85%A5%E5%BA%93%E5%8D%95%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E4%B8%BA%E5%90%8C%E4%B8%80%E4%B8%AA%E4%BE%9B%E5%BA%94%E5%95%86%22","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"body","label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E4%BD%93","exampleValue":"","required":false},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"billId","label":"%E5%AF%B9%E8%B4%A6%E5%8D%95%E5%8F%B7","required":true,"exampleValue":"2025081204577220"}}]}]}]}

接口调用示例

请求报文

  1. {  

  2.       

  3.     "inveOrderIds": [  

  4.         "2025-swq-2"  

  5.     ],  

  6.     "remark": "这是一个自动对账单",  

  7.     "operatorEmpNumber": "123456",  

  8.     "autoReconciliation": true  

  9. }

响应报文

  • 示例1
  1. {  

  2.     "body": 2025082804630478,  

  3.     "returnCode": "SUC0000",  

  4.     "success": true,  

  5.     "message": "成功"  

  6. }
  • 示例
  1. {  

  2.     "returnCode": "EROOR2",  

  3.     "success": false,  

  4.     "message": "存在作废或重复发起对账的入库单：2025-swq-2"  

  5. }

错误码说明

错误码错误信息解决方案
EROOR2业务执行错误请参考message错误信息
EROOR2业务执行错误
EROOR2业务执行错误操作人不存在
